scope: goat-desktop local startup and packaging entry
goal: Make GOAT Desktop startable through a normal local Windows script and an installable Python entry point without changing runtime action permissions.
claims: pyproject.toml exposes goat-desktop as an installable script entry point
scripts/start-goat-desktop.ps1 starts GOAT Desktop from a checkout by using .venv when available and adding src to PYTHONPATH
scripts/start-goat-desktop.ps1 -Check verifies the startup path without launching the GUI
No Stage 1, Stage 2, Stage 3, or Stage 4 permission is expanded
dod: Startup contract is covered by tests
README documents the local start path
